summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Palm Bay Real Estate property management features. All P0 critical tasks verified: Frontend Inventory.jsx and CrexiListings.jsx successfully connected to MongoDB backend /api/properties. Admin Panel can manage both curated listings and inventory lots through the database.

issues: Lead capture modal appears on admin page and can block interactions - may want to disable on admin routes

seed_data_creation: 582 inventory lots seeded via /api/seed-inventory + 5 curated listings added via /api/properties POST
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features verified working: GET /api/properties returns 587 properties (582 inventory + 5 curated). Inventory page filters to inventoryId truthy, Listings page filters to !inventoryId. Admin panel has curated/inventory dropdown filter with correct counts. Edit modal shows inventory-specific fields when editing inventory lots.

verified_features.Inventory page shows correct columns: PASS - Inventory ID, Unit, Block, Lot, Address, Size, Action
verified_features.Category filter counts correct: PASS - Commercial(2), Multifamily(1), Assemblages(1), Residential(1), All(5)
verified_features.Admin inventory view columns: PASS - Inv. ID, Property, Unit, Block, Lot, Size, Actions
verified_features.Admin edit modal inventory fields: PASS - inventoryId, unit, block, lot, streetNumber, streetName, county, owner, taxAccount
